arts.ttl: Portsmouth fans left confused by same thing as team named to face Preston North End
arts.sum: If you’re looking at the Pompey teamsheet ahead of today’s game against Preston North and feeling a bit confused, don’t worry – you’re not alone!

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss springs selection - and positional - surprises as he freshens up Blues against Preston
arts.sum: John Mousinho has freshened up his Pompey team for this afternoon’s trip to Preston.

arts.ttl: Preston North End v Portsmouth LIVE: Build-up, team news and gossip as Blues make long trip to Deepdale
arts.sum: Pompey make the long trip north to face Preston North End this afternoon.

arts.ttl: 'I can see' - Socceroos boss gives explanation for Portsmouth striker's latest call-up - just 29 minutes into comeback
arts.sum: Tony Popovic has provided an explanation for his decision to hand Kusini Yengi a call-up to the Australia national side for their World Cup qualifiers against Indonesia and China this month.

arts.ttl: 'Not obsessed with passes. Direct. Aggressive' - Preston North End boss provides insight into his team talk ahead of Portsmouth game
arts.sum: Paul Heckingbottom has provided his assessment of Pompey ahead of today’s Championship trip to Preston North End.

arts.ttl: Preston North End v Portsmouth team news as 12 out and 3 doubts
arts.sum: After consecutive home games, Pompey will make the long trip north to face Preston North End this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Majority of Portsmouth faithful all say same thing after Kusini Yengi Socceroos call-up question posed
arts.sum: Pompey fans on social media have been debating striker Kusini Yengi’s latest call-up to the Australia national side for their forthcoming World Cup qualifiers against Indonesia and China.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss reveals extent of Nico Schmid bargain as keeper’s form continues to ssoar
arts.sum: John Mousinho lauded the ‘really sensible’ signing of Nico Schmid as he highlighted Pompey’s bargain business.

arts.ttl: Former Portsmouth man receives backing from ex-Southampton boss amid Charlton struggles after £1m move
arts.sum: Former Pompey player Gassan Ahadme is struggling to justify his £1m League One price tag.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth poised for largest away backing since Championship return ahead of Preston North End trip - as Millwall tickets update also given
arts.sum: Pompey are on track for their biggest away following of the season.
